_comment: AERO (Aerodrome Finance) claim records. The admin_disclosure quote was verified verbatim against the raw source (raw.githubusercontent.com/aerodrome-finance/contracts/main/PERMISSIONS.md) on 2026-07-20 and flipped to review:'approved' in a reviewed PR. Verdict is still computed by verify.js each scan (VERIFIED only while every privileged selector found on-chain is in params.disclosed). Effect: clears the claim-light cap and moves disclosure to 100; AERO stays Under-Review at ≈D pending the mint-controller classification and the reviewedLowGrade decision — see docs/reviews/UR-AERO-2026-07.md.

claims.text: Aerodrome documents that AERO's only privileged capability is minting, held by the Minter contract for weekly gauge emissions and rebases.
claims.quote: Can mint AERO and distribute to Voter for gauge emissions and RewardsDistributor for claimable rebases
